title: RadioMC
description: Official RadioMC player. Stream 51,000+ live radio stations, podcasts, and YouTube audio via a seamless native interface. Supports MP3, AAC+, HLS, and video platforms through robust FFmpeg integration.
body:
RadioMC — The Official Player for radiomc.vercel.app
RadioMC brings the full experience of the radiomc.vercel.app website directly into Minecraft. Listen to over 51,000 radio stations from all over the world in real-time, without ever needing to Alt+Tab.

Features

Direct Access: Press the F10 key to open the interface at any time (works even inside menus or inventories).

Speed Control: Hold the Alt key and use the mouse scroll wheel to increase or decrease the playback speed.

YouTube Support: Integrated feature to add and play YouTube links.

Massive Database: Over 51,000 pre-cataloged stations ready to play.

Category Filters: Search easily by country, quality (bitrate), or station name.

Official Design: Modern interface based on the official website, featuring a functional volume slider.

Automatic Codec Installation: The mod automatically downloads and configures FFmpeg in the background to ensure full compatibility.

Purely Client-Side: Works on any server. Only you need to have the mod installed.

How to Use

Download and install Fabric Loader and Fabric API for version 1.21.1.

Drop the RadioMC .jar file into your mods folder.

Launch the game and press the F10 key.

Pick your favorite station and turn up the volume!

Supported Audio Formats
Thanks to the automated audio engine integration, RadioMC offers full support for 100% of available stations, including high-quality streams and modern formats:

MP3, AAC, AAC+, OGG, and HLS/M3U8

Note: Upon the first launch, the mod will handle all necessary components seamlessly in the background. You won't need to deal with terminals or Windows environment variables.

Dependencies

Fabric API (Required)

Internet Connection (For radio streaming and automatic codec setup)

Developed by: MiausDEV/Gatosmias (same person)
Official Website: radiomc.vercel.app
